powpow/net

powpow/net — Non-blocking TCP and UDP transport layer.

Import this module to get TCP server/client and UDP socket support:

import powpow/net

Or just import powpow to get everything.

Imports

loop, types, net/common, net/tcp, net/udp

Exports

openFileRead, getSockLen, UNIX_PATH_MAX, SEEK_END, sockSend, setTcpNoDelay, setTcpCork, lastSocketError, O_RDONLY, closeFile, sendFileChunk, setNonBlocking, readFile, sockInProgress, initNet, sockInterrupted, sockWritev, setReusePort, sockShutdown, sockWouldBlock, NetError, setReuseAddr, sockClose, getFileSize, sockRecv, resolveAddr, SEEK_SET, DefaultBufSize, seekFile, SEEK_CUR, DefaultSendFileChunk, SendFileChunkSize, OnClose, OnAccept, continueSendFile, injectFd, ConnState, closeAndRelease, shutdown, connectUnix, send, connect, OnData, getClientIp, listenUnix, MaxBufPoolSize, newConnection, send, sendv, TcpServer, close, MaxConnPoolSize, Connection, newTcpServer, close, listen, closeAfterDrain, send, bindUdp, sendTo, connectUdp, close, send, OnUdpData, UdpSocket, sendTo, runOnce, pauseTimer, newLoop, removeIdle, deferCall, Loop, poll, unregisterFd, close, TimerId, ==, modify, addIdle, ObserverCallback, Observer, FdWatcher, cancelTimer, FdCallback, EventType, unregister, TimerCallback, observe, Callback, run, register, addInterval, resumeTimer, isRunning, addTimer, stop, cancelObserver, TimerCallback, ObserverCallback, Callback, FdCallback, ==, EventType, TimerId
